title: Adaptive Presentation System
fullTitle: Context-Aware Adaptive Presentation Automation System and Method with Semantic Navigation and Dynamic Question/Text Annotation
description: Patented system for context-aware adaptive presentation automation incorporating semantic navigation and dynamic question/text annotation. Enables presentations to intelligently adapt based on real-time semantic understanding.
overview: A patented system and method for context-aware adaptive presentation automation that incorporates semantic navigation and dynamic question/text annotation. The invention enables presentations to intelligently adapt their flow and content based on real-time semantic understanding of the audience's queries, annotations, and navigational intent, allowing for a highly interactive and personalized presentation experience.

features.label: Semantic Navigation
features.description: Traverse presentation content non-linearly based on meaning of queries, not predefined slide indices.

features.label: Dynamic Question/Text Annotation
features.description: Real-time annotation and processing of questions, semantically mapped to relevant content segments.

features.label: Context-Aware Adaptation
features.description: Adjusts order, depth, and emphasis of slides on-the-fly according to cumulative session context.

features.label: Adaptive Content Delivery
features.description: Integrates with authoring tools to restructure content based on recognized semantic state.

results: Patent published: Application No 202641025829, Filed 05 March 2026, Published 29 May 2026
